vcs_commit_draft.subject: R6: Healthcare practice HIPAA control-map seed + CA/TX/NY state add-ons
vcs_commit_draft.body:
RECAP
- Did: eCFR HIPAA control-map (32 controls); source register; 3-state packs; bible seed v1; pinned GroundTruth/Compliance/lanes/R6_healthcare_practice/
- State: Federal 31 FOUND / 1 PARKED; CA 6 FOUND; TX index FOUND / sections ACCESS_RESTRICTED; NY DOH FOUND / SHIELD REQUIRES_CONFIRMATION
- Gaps: HHS 403; TX SPA; nysenate Cloudflare; NY AG 404; TMB 404
- Next: Re-probe parked sources; expand state coverage; consolidate

CEILING: Public sources only; 403/SPA/Cloudflare = park; gaps explicit.
